title: ardisia ruthiae
intro: Ardisia ruthiae, also known as the Red-berry Ardisia or Coral Berry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its berries, which contain anthocyanins that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ardisia ruthiae include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially acting as an anti-cancer agent. In traditional medicine, the berries are often prepared as teas, infusions, or dried powders, and are also used in herbal supplements to support overall health and well-being.
